title: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Reports Strong Q2 2025 Earnings
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals reported strong Q2 2025 earnings with total revenues of $264.6 million, representing a 9% increase compared to the same period last year. NUPLAZID revenues increased 7% year over year to $168.5 million in the second quarter of 2025. DAYBUE recorded net product sales of $96.1 million in the reported quarter, up 14% year over year. The company increased its NUPLAZID net sales guidance to $665-$690 million from the previous $650-$690 million range. Total revenue guidance was also raised to $1.045-$1.095 billion from $1.030-$1.095 billion. ACADIA reported completing enrollment in the phase III COMPASS PWS study of ACP-101 for Prader-Willi Syndrome (PWS). Top-line results are expected in the fourth quarter of 2025.
